title: Savory Northern Thai Pea Eggplant Gaeng Curry
description: A mustardy and springy Northern Thai dish featuring pea eggplant, cooked in a Dutch oven, perfect for a festive dinner. This keto-friendly gaeng curry is a flavorful and aromatic representation of Northern Thai cuisine.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the sliced pea eggplant and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the Northern Thai curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fish sauce and coconut milk, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
